title: Royal net
note: Two queen moves finish the same net. Any checkmate is a correct answer.

title: Corner box
note: Use the king to take away the escape squares.

title: Back-rank curtain
note: Several queen moves mate; the board accepts each of them.

title: Deflect the rook
note: The king is exposed, but the decisive idea begins with deflection rather than a grab.

title: Clear the file
note: Offer the queen to clear the f-file, then use the rook with tempo.

title: Knight sacrifice
note: The first move is a sacrifice; calculate the king chase before committing.

title: The Légal attack
note: Calculate through the queen sacrifice: the minor pieces take over the attack.

title: Defuse the attack
note: The knight sacrifice looks alarming. Calculate the king route and the active counterplay, not merely the first check.

title: Pawn-endgame zugzwang
note: No checks, no loose queens: calculate the pawn race until the breakthrough is certain.
